标题: ❤️ Latest double-sided three-dimensional totem design, made with soft cashmere fabric in a classic pink and grey color combination. Artistic and easy to maintain, measuring 27*230 cm. 100% cashmere.

L brand. [Men's Wool Scarf] Highly praised for its rare high-end design! A great benefit for family members! This is a very stylish men's scarf with a simple and elegant design. The color scheme is very attractive and suitable for any man. The star pattern adds a delicate touch without being too flashy. A large shipment was sent out a few months ago, and there is a small amount left for everyone to enjoy. This classic men's 30cm wide cashmere scarf is unisex, made of 100% cashmere, measuring 30*180cm (including tassels). It is suitable for both formal and casual wear. It can be worn folded or wrapped around, exuding a gentlemanly and warm style.

Don't disappoint everyone's expectations ❤️ She's here! The highly sought-after limited edition sheepskin and fur reversible scarf that's hard to find in both domestic and international stores 🔥🔥🔥 The new color that all personal shoppers are scrambling for, currently almost impossible to buy if you have the money, you have to pre-order and wait! It's truly beautiful, with a stylish yet warm feel. Paired with autumn and winter gray or brown coats, it looks incredibly elegant!!! Officially priced overseas, personal shoppers are also around that range and you still have to wait, but we offer it at a direct price with immediate availability! You'll truly feel like you're dreaming when you get it in your hands. The quality is exceptional, don't underestimate this scarf, the color matching and craftsmanship inside are very intricate. The shades have been meticulously adjusted to be identical! The gradient series is absolutely stunning. Any woman who sees it would want to own it, the color combination is just too beautiful! This batch is limited, so we hope you all have the chance to be the first to own this piece of luck! Size: 45*190cm (including tassels)

【Shining Letters】This So Shine Monogram shawl is made of metallic gold and silver yarns and silk material, adorned with striking logos. The shiny gold finish and silk blend fabric bring a luxurious aesthetic. Featuring tassels, it is an ideal accessory for daily styling. 47% silk, 26% viscose, 17% wool, 10% metallic yarn. Monogram jacquard fabric with metallic yarn background pattern, finished with woven English lettering at the bottom and tassel decoration. Dry clean only, 140*140 cm square scarf.

The special offer Plaid Monogram floral blanket interprets classic patterns in subtle tones, embodying timeless aesthetic concepts. Crafted from a blend of wool and cashmere, it offers warmth and comfort on cold nights. The large size features a double-sided design with a full Monogram floral jacquard weave, exuding elegance. Composition: 90% wool, 10% cashmere. Size: 140x105cm. Edged with LV initials.
